heading: Number of Representatives from each State in 78th and subsequent Congresses
label: 2b Number of Representatives from each State in 78th and subsequent Congresses
text: Each State shall be entitled, in the Seventy-eighth and in each Congress thereafter until the taking effect of a reapportionment under a subsequent statute or , to the number of Representatives shown in the statement transmitted to the Congress on , based upon the method known as the method of equal proportions, no State to receive less than one Member.section 2a of this titleJanuary 8, 1941
notes: Certificates to Executives of States, , required Clerk of House of Representatives, within 15 days of , to send a new certificate of entitlement of a State to Representatives, if such a certificate had been sent prior to , under provisions of .Act Nov. 15, 1941, ch. 470, § 2(b)55 Stat. 762section 2a of this titleNov. 15, 1941Nov. 15, 1941
